title: Core model & render engine hardening
goal: Make the model+renderer complete enough that every later UI feature is a thin view over tested core code.

tasks.title: LayerTransform struct (rotation, skew, flip) composed in renderer
tasks.acceptance: Transform math unit-tested; renderer pixel tests for rotated/skewed layers.
tasks.notes: LayerTransform in Sources/PhotonzCore/LayerTransform.swift; Layer.transform defaults to .identity. Convention: angles in top-left model space (positive rotation = clockwise on screen, positive skewX slants bottom edge right), composed flip→skew→rotation around the layer center. Renderer mirrors angular components (negates rotation/skewX/skewY) because CI is y-up, and positions layers center-based so transformed extents stay anchored. Tests: LayerTransformTests (core), TransformRenderingTests (pixel).

tasks.title: Corner radius + border + shadow rendering in DocumentRenderer
tasks.acceptance: Pixel tests: rounded corners clip, border strokes at right width/color, shadow darkens below-right by default offset.
tasks.notes: Hex colors parsed by new pure RGBA struct in PhotonzCore (RGBA.swift, #RRGGBB[AA]). Renderer pipeline order: crop → scale → blur → corner-radius clip → border (inner stroke via CIRoundedRectangleGenerator + CISourceOutCompositing) → transform → position → shadow (silhouette via CIColorMatrix, gaussian blur, offset y-negated for CI) → opacity last so it fades everything together. Shadow is composited after positioning on purpose: its expanded extent would break center-based placement. Colored (non-black) shadows slightly darken via the alpha-weighted matrix — fine for default black, revisit if colored shadows look off. Tests: RGBATests, StyleRenderingTests.

tasks.title: Text rasterizer (CoreText) in PhotonzRender
tasks.acceptance: TextContent renders with requested font/size/color; pixel test asserts ink coverage > 0 in glyph region.
tasks.notes: TextRasterizer (Sources/PhotonzRender/TextRasterizer.swift): CTFramesetter word-wraps inside the layer frame, top-left aligned, transparent background, no AppKit (kCTFontAttributeName/kCTForegroundColorAttributeName keys). Renderer rasterizes at frame size so scale-to-frame is 1:1. Tests: TextRasterizerTests incl. end-to-end composite.

tasks.title: Annotation rasterizer: arrow, rect, ellipse, line, highlight (multiply blend)
tasks.acceptance: Pixel tests per shape; arrowhead present at end point; highlight multiplies not covers.
tasks.notes: AnnotationRasterizer (PhotonzRender) draws in layer-local top-left coords via a flipped CGContext; rect/ellipse strokes inset by strokeWidth/2 to stay inside start..end. Arrowhead triangle math is pure: Geometry.arrowhead(start:end:strokeWidth:) → [tip, leftWing, rightWing], headLength = max(3.5·strokeWidth, 8), halfWidth = 0.4·headLength. Highlight rasterizes as a filled box and DocumentRenderer.render composites it with CIMultiplyBlendMode (cropped back to canvas extent). Tests: GeometryTests arrowhead cases, AnnotationRenderingTests.

tasks.title: Blend modes on LayerStyle (normal, multiply, screen)
tasks.notes: BlendMode enum (normal/multiply/screen) on LayerStyle, default .normal. DocumentRenderer.composite switches on it (CIMultiplyBlendMode/CIScreenBlendMode, cropped to canvas extent). Highlight annotations force .multiply regardless of style. Pixel-test tolerances are wide (e.g. multiply 128⊗128 → 45..85) because CI may blend in linear or gamma space depending on context config. Tests: BlendModeTests.

tasks.title: Async render path: renderer off main actor, latest-wins coalescing
tasks.acceptance: AppState API unchanged; stress test mutating 100x rapidly ends with correct final frame.
tasks.notes: RenderScheduler actor (PhotonzRender): submit() replaces the pending doc and spawns a drain task if none; drain renders inside the actor (off-main) so concurrent submits queue and coalesce; waitUntilIdle() for tests. AppState keeps its sync API; rerender() fire-and-forgets a submit. Scheduler is created lazily on first rerender (not in init) so the frame closure can capture self; closure drops frames if history became nil meanwhile. Tests: RenderSchedulerTests incl. 100x-mutation stress.

tasks.title: Perf baseline: benchmark target rendering 12MP/10-layer doc, record in docs/progress
tasks.notes: RenderPerfTests benchmarks the 12MP/10-layer doc (warm-up + median of 10). Baseline 2026-06-12: median 45.5ms vs 16ms target — recorded in docs/progress/perf.md with optimization suspects. Test asserts a loose 250ms regression guard only, so CI stays stable.
